editorBlockCallout: Write a tip or important note here…
editorBlockGameHint: This inserts an optional game item. Students will open the standard Game Player with this cartridge preselected.
editorBlockGameTopicsHint: These topics will be sent to the cartridge as context (topics=...).
editorBlockMediaUrl: Link to video, audio, or image
editorBlockMediaUrlHint: Paste an address starting with https://…
editorDraftLocalHint: On this device only. Tap Save lesson to write to the tree.
editorDraftUnsavedHint: Not in the tree yet. Save writes to the lesson; Discard reverts to the last saved version.
editorDraftDiscardConfirm: Discard changes and revert to the last version saved in the tree?
editorDraftRestored: Restored a draft from this device.
editorTitleAttrH1: Main lesson title in the text (#)
editorTitleAttrH2: Large outline step (##). Same as “New part” in the lesson menu.
editorTitleAttrH3: Small outline step (###). Same as “New sub-step” in the lesson menu.
